rationale: Header "Payroll_Num" and consistent alphanumeric pattern "P-NNNNN" strongly suggest a stable HR/payroll employee identifier.
Header "Full Name" is a classic combined name field that must be split into first and last name components.
"DOB" is a standard abbreviation for Date of Birth, and MM/DD/YY sample values confirm birth date content.
value_warning: Dates are in MM/DD/YY (2-digit year) format; downstream parser should interpret 2-digit years with appropriate century pivot (e.g., 00–30 → 2000s, 31–99 → 1900s).

rationale: Header "Home State" and sample values are full US state names, clearly mapping to the residence state canonical field.
value_warning: Values are full state names (e.g., "California"); canonical expects 2-letter USPS codes (e.g., "CA"). Value-level transform required before publish.

rationale: Header "Postal Code" and sample values are clearly US ZIP codes; mix of 5-digit and ZIP+4 formats present.
value_warning: Mix of 5-digit and ZIP+4 formats (e.g., "94107-1234"); downstream system must normalize to 5-digit or ZIP+4 as required by tenant configuration.

rationale: Header "Base Rate" with values under 200 strongly indicates hourly pay rate, mapping to annual_salary with required transform.
value_warning: Values appear to be hourly rates (all under $200); requires ×2080 annualization transform before publish to produce annual_salary in USD.

rationale: "Start Dt" is a common abbreviation for employment start date; ISO-formatted date samples align with hire_date semantics.
Header "FT/PT" and values like "FT"/"PT" indicate work schedule, not employment status; no canonical field captures schedule.
Header "Policy Amount" directly signals insurance face/coverage amount; sample values are USD dollar figures consistent with life policy limits.
value_warning: Values are currency strings with "$" and "," formatting (e.g., "$250,000"); must be stripped to plain numeric USD integers before publish.

rationale: Header "Smoker Status" directly references the smoker canonical field; sample values Never/Former/Current confirm tobacco indicator.
value_warning: 3-way values (Never/Former/Current) detected; canonical expects binary (Yes/No). "Former" reconciliation must be resolved per tenant policy before publish.

rationale: "Kids" header with small integer sample values strongly suggests a count of child dependents covered under the policy.
value_warning: Header "Kids" implies children-only scope; confirm with tenant whether spouse/domestic partner dependents are tracked separately or included in this count before publishing.

rationale: Header is "Notes" with free-text sample values; no canonical field captures unstructured commentary.
Header "Termination Date" is a termination event date; no canonical v1 field captures this — it is explicitly not hire_date.
Header "Effective Date" signals benefit effective date, not hire date; no canonical field captures benefit effective date in v1.
